name: Moritz 'Fenex' Friedewald
headline: Software Developer | Media Informatics
homeIntro: I am a Media Informatics student at THM Friedberg and I focus on practical software development with C# and ASP.NET. I build tools that solve concrete problems, from parser/compiler projects to data-oriented game systems and creative workflows.
quickIntro: Software developer focused on architecture, practical tooling, and fast learning of new technologies.
aboutText: I quickly and independently work into new software architecture and development topics. My core stack is C# and ASP.NET, while I also explore Go and Zig. I have experience with backend development, support tooling, and performance-focused seminar/project work.
contactIntro: I am always open to interesting projects, collaborations, and conversations about software, tools, and creative development.
